metadata.title: Events | AdonERP
metadata.description: Join Adon ERP community events — webinars, workshops, meetups, and conferences. Learn from core team members and top contributors, network with peers, and stay updated on the latest features.

hero.title: grow
hero.description: Webinars, workshops, meetups, and conferences — both online and in-person. Join the Adon ERP community wherever you are in the world.

upcomingSection.title: Mark your calendar
upcomingSection.description: Live events every month — webinars, workshops, meetups, and lightning sessions. Register for free.

events.title: Build Your First Custom Module in 90 Minutes

formatsSection.title: Four ways to meet the community
formatsSection.description: Whether you prefer deep dives, quick learning, or real-world networking — there is an event format for you.

features.title: Live webinars
features.description: Join the core team and community experts for deep-dive sessions on new features, best practices, and migration paths.

features.title: Hands-on workshops
features.description: Code alongside the instructors. Each workshop ships with a ready-to-run sandbox and post-event lab exercises.

features.title: Community meetups
features.description: In-person gatherings in major cities around the world — from Berlin to Nairobi. Host your own local meetup with our kit.

features.title: Recorded library
features.description: Missed a session? Every event is recorded and added to the on-demand library within 24 hours of going live.

speakersSection.title: Learn from the best
speakersSection.description: Core team members and top community contributors share their expertise in every session.

agendaSection.title: What to expect
agendaSection.description: A 90-minute format designed to maximise learning and minimise meeting-fatigue.

schedule.label: Opening Keynote
schedule.speaker: Omar Y.
schedule.description: State of Adon ERP: what shipped, what is next, and how you can help.

schedule.label: Hands-on demo
schedule.speaker: Aisha K.
schedule.description: Building a purchasing workflow from scratch in the live sandbox.

schedule.label: Lightning talks
schedule.speaker: Community
schedule.description: Five 5-minute talks from first-time and repeat contributors.

schedule.label: Open Q&A
schedule.speaker: Core team
schedule.description: Ask anything — roadmap, architecture, licensing, or career paths.

pastEventsSection.title: Missed something? Watch it
pastEventsSection.description: Every session is recorded and added to the on-demand library so you can catch up at your own pace.

testimonials.quote: The v17 Release Deep Dive answered every question I had about migration. Being able to ask the core team directly saved us weeks of uncertainty.
testimonials.name: Adèle Moreau

testimonials.quote: The Berlin meetup was incredible. I met three people I now work with daily. These events are where the real networking happens.
testimonials.name: Fritz Lehmann

ctaSection.title: Your seat is
ctaSection.subtitle: waiting
ctaSection.description: From quick 30-minute webinars to full-day hands-on workshops — there is always something happening in the Adon ERP community.
ctaSection.footerText: Free attendance · Recordings on demand · Open to everyone
